sourceNotes: Assam: Prafulla Kumar Mahanta CM until May 2001, then Tarun Gogoi CM through December 2005. Main issues: ULFA insurgency, Bodo Accord (2003), Brahmaputra basin flood management, Assam Accord implementation, Assam Gas Cracker project. Built programmatically matching the schema and calibration constraints.

newsItems.title: Secret Killings Controversy Triggers Assembly Protests (2001-01)
newsItems.description: Allegations of extrajudicial 'secret killings' of ULFA family members trigger shouting matches in the assembly, with the opposition demanding a judicial inquiry targeting Mahanta's government.

reactionOptions.text: The state government welcomes a judicial probe and vows to bring all extrajudicial actors to book, addressing the secret killings issues.

risk.badOutcome: Delays in court proceedings fuel localized protests from victim family unions in relation to secret killings.

reactionOptions.text: Opposition leaders stage walkouts, demanding a CBI-monitored investigation into secret killings, criticizing the handling of the secret killings developments.

risk.badOutcome: The opposition's walkouts fail to gain traction as the judicial panel begins formal hearings regarding the secret killings.

reactionOptions.text: A joint assembly inquiry committee is formed to record statements and review police intelligence logs, seeking a consensus on the secret killings situation.

risk.badOutcome: Liaison discussions are delayed by a lack of coordination in the state legal department in the secret killings joint efforts.

reactionOptions.text: The DGP office declines to comment on the internal files relating to secret killings operations, citing the sensitivity of the secret killings context.

newsItems.title: Brahmaputra Embankment Repair Budgets Approved (2001-02)
newsItems.description: The state government approves emergency funding for reinforcing Brahmaputra river embankments before the summer monsoon, aiming to protect low-lying agricultural tracts.

reactionOptions.text: The Water Resources Department deploys repair teams to reinforce critical river segments, addressing the embankment budgets issues.

risk.badOutcome: Missing design blueprints delay the reinforcements, drawing warnings from river engineers in relation to embankment budgets.

reactionOptions.text: Opposition AGP leaders claim the embankment allocations are mere paper announcements before assembly polls, criticizing the handling of the embankment budgets developments.

risk.badOutcome: The AGP criticism is ignored as rural voter groups welcome the reinforcement works regarding the embankment budgets.

reactionOptions.text: A joint committee of irrigation engineers and local panchayat heads is formed to monitor embankment works, seeking a consensus on the embankment budgets situation.

risk.badOutcome: Liaison discussions are delayed by a lack of coordination in the municipal development board in the embankment budgets joint efforts.

reactionOptions.text: The Irrigation Secretary declines to comment on the taluka-wise budget distribution details, citing the sensitivity of the embankment budgets context.
